subcodes.title: Public address at Stanford University on 1912-10-08
subcodes.first_line: The greatest attainment in the world of humanity has ever been scientific
subcodes.first_line_orig: اعظم منقبت عالم انسانی علم است زیرا کشف حقایق اشیاست و چون امروز خود را در
subcodes.subjects: @law of transformation and change, @universal peace; world unity, @war and peace, @harmony of science and religion, @need for an educator, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @high station of learning, @power of the mind over nature, @universal human capacity for spiritual recognition, @unity; oneness of humanity
